nodes.name: Validate WF-00 Handoff
nodes.notes: Validates WF-00 output. No DB writes here.

nodes.name: Update Conversation Session With Prompt Request

parameters.jsCode:
const allowedKeys = [
  'wf01_status',
  'prompt_request_id',
  'workspace_id',
  'user_id',
  'project_id',
  'conversation_session_id',
  'source_user_message_id',
  'output_type',
  'platform',
  'prompt_request_status',
  'brief_decisions_created',
  'next_workflow',
  'handoff_payload',
  'errors'
];
const out = {};
for (const key of allowedKeys) out[key] = $json[key];
return [{ json: out }];

nodes.notes: Returns only the approved WF-01 output contract.
